transcript.text:
[Editor looking for work...]
[Finds a folder called Death]
[Took a lot of courage to open the folder finally]
[Unreleased video from before]
I'm going to do the Death Donkatsu challenge today
[A big challenge for Tzuyang]
[Because she has a low spice tolerance]
[Not uploaded because it was very sad]
I can't hear anything
[The world's saddest mukbang starting now!]
Hello everyone
I'm here near Shindaebang today
I'm not too good at eating spicy foods
But I'm here to eat spicy donkatsu
I will prove myself
[Onjeong Donkatsu] [Seoul, Gwanak-gu]

I don't think I can do it...
Let's head inside
Hello
I've done a giant donkatsu challenge here before
And rang the golden bell
I'll try the spicy challenge today
Spicy Death Donkatsu The name itself is terrifying
[20 minutes time limit]
[Milk]
[She's ready]
Excuse me
Death Donkatsu, please
Let's drink this first
What if I get an upset stomach?
Should I just not do it?
[Let's just drink some milk...]

[Stomach medicine]
I'm not too good at eating spicy foods
So I won't actually do the challenge, but I'll still time myself
[Let's protect her this time...!]
[It's here!]
[Endgame boss]
[Drink the rest...]
[Start]
I don't get nervous to eat piles of food But I get nervous eating spicy foods
The smell is no joke
The smell of hell?
[Contemplating...]
[Let's overcome!]
[Are you okay...?]
[Why is she not saying anything?]
[Cheating]

[Please say something...]
I'm okay, but I'm tearing up
I feel fine
[1 piece done under 4 minutes]
[Shaking]
Is this food for humans?
I'm losing my hearing
[Comes back with water]
I feel better after drinking water
They said I can drink water, but not milk
This relieves stress
It was insanely spicy at first But now I'm numb to it
Am I senseless now?
Am I good at eating spicy food now?
But I'm tearing up
I think my spice tolerance is pretty good

[2 pieces gone in 8 minutes]
You're doing a good job
It's alright
[1 last piece]
[I wanna go home...] [Where am I...?] [Why am I here...?] [Is this a dream...?]
[Wake up!]
[Almost there..!!!]
I feel fine, except for the tears
[Yes, you definitely look okay...]
[She might be able to finish it all]
[Tears of victory]
[She also has to finish the rice]
[Singing a sad song]
-Amazing -I should've done the challenge
This is no joke
Are my lips okay?

It's like 2 times bigger
I would've beaten the challenge if I said I was going to do it
I thought it would be impossible
Let's eat this just to be safe
Milk isn't helping
My eyes are swollen too
Lips too
I can't feel my lips
But I cleared it
It was easier than the Gigantic Donkatsu challenge
I keep zoning out
It relieves stress
I have a strong stomach, so it doesn't hurt
But my tongue hurts
I'm a fan!
Thank you

I did it
Thanks everyone
[She completed the challenge!] [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
